violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. Ice scoop found in dirty container on top of the ice machine. Scoops should be stored in a clean location between uses.

General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. Observe food employee switch gloves, but she did not wash her hands before putting on the new pair of gloves. Hands should always be washed before putting on gloves.

Preventing contamination by employees. — --Employee's single-use gloves were not discarded after being damaged or soiled. Observed food employee touch her glasses and phone with gloved hands and she did not change them before continuing food preparations. Gloves should be changed after touching items not related to food preparations.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. Scoop for dispensing ice was found stored in a dirty container above the ice machine. Scoop should be stored in a clean location between uses. In-use spoon also found stored on top of the Ninja crock pot. Utensils should remain in the items they are dispensing to protect from contamination or washed after each use.

Time as a public health control. — --Food was not marked or identified with the time within which it must be cooked, served, or discarded. Food items in the hot hold display were not marked with the time they need to be discarded. When time is used as a public health control, the time it was prepared or time to discard must be marked. ***Items should be discarded.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with waste receptacle as needed. Hand washing sink is not provided with a waste receptacle. Hand washing sinks should be provided with a receptacle for collecting used paper towels. **Corrected during inspection.
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Available, knowledgeable, certified manager (4 pts deducted)
Clean dry location, protected (1 pt deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
